title: Docs: Add comprehensive API documentation
original_text: Added comprehensive API documentation. Documented all REST endpoints with request/response examples. Added authentication and authorization documentation. Implemented API versioning documentation. Added error code documentation and troubleshooting guide. Added API rate limiting documentation. Created API quick start guide. Result: API documentation complete.
expected_body_lines: - Document all REST endpoints with request/response examples
- Add error code documentation and troubleshooting guide
- Add API rate limiting documentation and quick start
expected_command: git commit -m "docs(api): add comprehensive API documentation"
